narrative:
Guernsey County has 23,631 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.3 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.6% of registrants.
